title: Average Rate of Change
aria_label: f of b minus f of a, divided by b minus a
notes: The average rate of change measures how much a function's output changes per unit of input over an interval.
It is the slope of the secant line connecting the two points (a, f(a)) and (b, f(b)) on the graph.
For a linear function, the average rate of change is always equal to the slope m.
For a nonlinear function (like a parabola), the rate of change varies — this formula gives the average over [a, b].
This formula is the foundation of differential calculus — the derivative is the limit of the average rate of change as the interval shrinks to zero.

examples.description: Find the average rate of change of f(x) = x² on [1, 4].
Find the average rate of change of f(x) = 2x + 3 on [0, 5].

applications: Calculating average speed, average velocity, or average acceleration over a time interval.
Comparing growth rates of different functions over the same interval.
Approximating instantaneous rates of change — the gateway concept to calculus.

es.title: Tasa Promedio de Cambio
notes: La tasa promedio de cambio mide cuánto cambia la salida de una función por unidad de entrada en un intervalo.
Es la pendiente de la secante que conecta los puntos (a, f(a)) y (b, f(b)) en la gráfica.
Para una función lineal, la tasa promedio de cambio siempre es igual a la pendiente m.
Para una función no lineal (como una parábola), la tasa varía — esta fórmula da el promedio en [a, b].
Esta fórmula es la base del cálculo diferencial — la derivada es el límite de la tasa promedio cuando el intervalo tiende a cero.

examples.description: Encuentra la tasa promedio de cambio de f(x) = x² en [1, 4].

ht.title: Vitès Chanjman Mwayèn
notes: Vitès chanjman mwayèn mezire konbyen sorèt yon fonksyon chanje pa inite antre sou yon entèval.
Li se pant liy sekan ki konekte pwen (a, f(a)) ak (b, f(b)) sou grafik la.
Pou yon fonksyon lineyè, vitès chanjman mwayèn toujou egal pant m nan.
Pou yon fonksyon ki pa lineyè (tankou yon parabòl), vitès la varye — fòmil sa a bay mwayèn sou [a, b].
Fòmil sa a se baz kalkil diferansyèl — derivatif la se limit vitès chanjman mwayèn lè entèval la vin zewo.

examples.description: Jwenn vitès chanjman mwayèn f(x) = x² sou [1, 4].
